summary: Comprehensive general testing of textile management system. Fixed critical bug in 3 pages (InventarioSalidas, GuiasRemision, CalidadMerma) where registros.map() failed due to paginated API response. All 14 main pages now load correctly. Backend: 26/27 tests passed. Frontend: All pages functional.

minor.issue: 500 error seen in console logs during page navigation - needs investigation

issues: React key prop warnings in lists

bugs_fixed.issue: registros.map is not a function - page crashed on load
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed API call to use ?all=true and handle both paginated {items:[]} and array responses

bugs_fixed.issue: Same registros.map error - page would crash
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed API call to use ?all=true and handle both response formats

bugs_fixed.issue: Same registros.map error - page would crash
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed API call to use ?all=true and handle both response formats

action_items: Investigate 500 error appearing in console logs during navigation
Fix React key prop warnings in list components
Fix HTML nesting warnings (table structure issues)
critical_code_review_comments: API response format inconsistency: Some endpoints return arrays, others return {items:[], total:N}. Consider standardizing all list endpoints to use consistent pagination format.
Frontend components should always handle both array and paginated object responses defensively
context_for_next_testing_agent: All main pages tested and working. Fixed registros.map bug in 3 pages. Backend pagination working correctly with ?limit=50&offset=0 format. Use ?all=true for dropdown data. DB is slow (5-20s), use generous timeouts. Key routes: /registros (15 columns), /modelos, /inventario, /inventario/salidas, /inventario/ingresos, /maestros/movimientos.
features_verified: Registros search by N Corte - Working
